verdicts.note: Public safety is a broad priority without a rubric mechanism.
She has no elected record but has substantial prior campaign experience, making +1 more proportionate than maximal renewal.
Parental rights supplies the traditional-values direction, but the dossier provides no broader social-policy program.
He is new to elected office but brings military, business, party, and prior-campaign experience.
Parental rights establishes direction but not a maximal social-policy placement.

missing.basis: Her opposition to state mandates and emphasis on parental authority favor decisions below the state level.
